post.subject: What a boring day
post.body: So i got up at 11am, got a shower and breakfast and sat my rear end firmly on this very chair infront of my lovely computer. Its now 6pm... I havent been on computer all day though. I watched a few episodes of Red Dwarf and watched All Grown Up (Rugrats), rolled a joint and stuck a pen up my nose. Mum and bro are out shopping. I think they are going to bring back dinner. Hopefully they will. Then I will consider going out once I've eaten. Until that time comes I will be content sitting here for a bit longer. Unless i get really really bored. So today dad got new car. Nice 4 X 4. Should be fun. Only had a quick glance at it. Im so bored. Got a lot that i can keep myself occupied with, mostly on computer; learning, doing something in general. But what i really want is to be with people... hmmm... Maybe something will crop up sometime. Im not workin today, but im workin tomorrow and hopefully I'll be able to work on Sunday and everyday next week would be nice. I want fucking money!
